ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, in preparation, completed, canceled) */,
  "order_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the order was placed (online or in-person) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the menu item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the menu item was last updated */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Whether the menu item is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price of the item, if applicable */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Special instructions or notes for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the menu item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (foreign key to `suppliers`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the receipt belongs to */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date and time the receipt was generated */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the receipt */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the receipt */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
